[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00000000 a
1 00000000 a
2 00000000 a
3 10000100 2
4 10100100 3
5 10100000 2
6 10100100 3
7 00000000 a

01 10 00100000 1
12 21 01011000 3
23 32 00000000 a match 0 1 2 7
34 43 00000110 2
45 54 00010101 3
56 65 10111011 6
67 76 11111001 6
70 07 00101001 3

02 20 01111000 4
13 31 01011000 3
24 42 00000110 2
35 53 00010011 3
46 64 10101110 5
57 75 01000010 2
60 06 11010000 3
71 17 00001001 2

03 30 01111000 4
14 41 01011110 5
25 52 00010011 3
36 63 10101000 3
47 74 01010111 5
50 05 01101011 5
61 16 11110000 4
72 27 01010001 3

04 40 01111110 6
15 51 01001011 4
26 62 10101000 3
37 73 01010001 3
